title: Conclusive Presumptions Defined
text: The presumptions established by this article, and all other presumptions declared by law to be conclusive, are conclusive presumptions.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences

notes: Defines conclusive presumptions as those established by this article or otherwise declared conclusive by law. These presumptions are not rebuttable.
